testcase.name: contextLoads

WARN 27160 --- [kupanga] [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : table "utilisateurs" does not exist, skipping Hibernate: create table bien_images ( bien_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, url varchar(500) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table bien_poi ( nombre_trouve integer not null, present boolean not null, rayon_metres float(53) not null, bien_id bigint not null, calcule_le timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, poi_type varchar(255) not null check (poi_type in ('SCHOOL','HOSPITAL','PHARMACY','KINDERGARTEN')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table biens ( annee_construction integer, ascenseur boolean, charges_mensuelles float(53), colocation boolean, depot_garantie float(53), disponible_de date, etage integer, loyer_mensuel float(53), meuble boolean, nombre_chambres integer, nombre_pieces integer, surface_habitable float(53), created_at timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, locataire_id bigint, proprietaire_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), adresse varchar(255), classe_energie varchar(255) check (classe_energie in ('A','B','C','D','E','F','G')), classe_ges varchar(255) check (classe_ges in ('A','B','C','D','E','F','G')), code_postal varchar(255), description varchar(255), mode_chauffage varchar(255) check (mode_chauffage in ('ELECTRIQUE','GAZ','FIOUL','BOIS','POMPE_A_CHALEUR','POELE','COLLECTIF','SANS_CHAUFFAGE')), pays varchar(255), titre varchar(255), type_bien varchar(255) check (type_bien in ('APPARTEMENT','MAISON','STUDIO')), ville varchar(255), localisation geometry(Point, 4326), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table cles_remises ( quantite integer not null, etat_des_lieux_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, type_cle varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table compteur_releves ( index float(53) not null, etat_des_lieux_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, numero_compteur varchar(255), type_compteur varchar(255) not null check (type_compteur in ('EAU_FROIDE','EAU_CHAUDE','ELECTRICITE_HP','ELECTRICITE_HC','GAZ')), unite varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table contrats ( charges_mensuelles float(53), date_debut date, date_fin date, depot_garantie float(53), duree_bail_mois integer, loyer_mensuel float(53), bien_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), date_signature_locataire timestamp(6), date_signature_proprietaire timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, locataire_id bigint not null, proprietaire_id bigint not null, token_expiration timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), url_pdf varchar(500), adresse_bien varchar(255), signature_locataire TEXT, signature_proprietaire TEXT, statut varchar(255) not null check (statut in ('BROUILLON','EN_ATTENTE_SIGNATURE_PROPRIO','EN_ATTENTE_SIGNATURE_LOCATAIRE','SIGNE','EXPIRE','ANNULE')), token_signature varchar(255) unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table documents ( date_ajout date, bien_id bigint, id bigserial not null, nom varchar(255), url varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table elements_edl ( id bigserial not null, piece_id bigint not null, description varchar(255), etat_element varchar(255) not null check (etat_element in ('BON','USAGE_NORMAL','MAUVAIS','HORS_SERVICE')), observation TEXT, type_element varchar(255) not null check (type_element in ('MUR','PLAFOND','SOL','FENETRE','PORTE','VOLET','PRISE','LUMINAIRE','RADIATEUR','EQUIPEMENT','AUTRE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table etats_des_lieux ( date_realisation date not null, heure_realisation time(6), bien_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), date_signature_locataire timestamp(6), date_signature_proprietaire timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, locataire_id bigint not null, proprietaire_id bigint not null, token_expiration timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), url_pdf varchar(500), observations TEXT, signature_locataire TEXT, signature_proprietaire TEXT, statut varchar(255) not null check (statut in ('BROUILLON','EN_ATTENTE_SIGNATURE_PROPRIO','EN_ATTENTE_SIGNATURE_LOCATAIRE','SIGNE','EXPIRE')), token_signature varchar(255) unique, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('ENTREE','SORTIE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table messages ( lu boolean, bien_id bigint, date_envoi timestamp(6), destinataire_id bigint, expediteur_id bigint, id bigserial not null, contenu varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table password_reset_token ( expiration_date timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, user_id bigint unique, token varchar(255) unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table pieces_edl ( ordre integer, etat_des_lieux_id bigint not null, id bigserial not null, nom_piece varchar(255) not null, observations TEXT, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table quittances ( annee integer, charges_mensuelles float(53), date_echeance date, date_paiement date, loyer_mensuel float(53), montant_total float(53), bien_id bigint not null, contrat_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), date_signature_proprietaire timestamp(6), id bigserial not null, locataire_id bigint not null, proprietaire_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6), url_pdf varchar(500), mois varchar(255), signature_proprietaire TEXT, statut varchar(255) not null check (statut in ('EN_ATTENTE','PAYEE','EN_RETARD','IMPAYEE')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table refresh_token ( revoked boolean, expiration timestamp(6) with time zone, id bigserial not null, user_id bigint not null unique, token varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table utilisateurs ( a_completer_profil boolean, id bigserial not null, email varchar(255), mot_de_passe varchar(255), nom varchar(255), prenom varchar(255), role varchar(255) check (role in ('ROLE_PROPRIETAIRE','ROLE_LOCATAIRE','ROLE_ADMIN')), url_photo_profil varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_bien_poi_bien_id on bien_poi (bien_id) Hibernate: create index idx_bien_poi_type on bien_poi (poi_type) Hibernate: create index idx_bien_poi_present on bien_poi (bien_id, poi_type, present)
